Launcher app and glance management, legacy menu structures, and platform-specific header file.

## Folders
- **[default](default/README.md)**: Launcher app and glance management for Pebble firmware, including menu layers, alarms, music, notifications, and various glance features.
- **[legacy](legacy/README.md)**: Implements and defines structures for a launcher menu application on Pebble devices.

## Files
- **[launcher_app.h](launcher_app.h.md)**: Header file for the launcher app, including platform-specific includes and app info retrieval.
